item.title: 美联储褐皮书显示消费者信心疲软拖累销售
item.description: 美联储表示，尽管越来越多的地区报告经济活动停滞或下滑，但近几周美国大部分地区的经济活动仍以轻微至温和的速度增长。【原文：US economic activity increased at a slight to moderate pace across most regions in recent weeks, though a growing number reported flat or declining activity, the Federal Reserve said.】

item.title: 新西兰房价小幅上涨，购房者仍持谨慎态度
item.description: 新西兰2月份房价小幅上涨，但房地产市场整体依然低迷，房价较去年同期仍呈下跌态势，较2022年峰值下跌逾17%。【原文：New Zealand house prices edged higher in February, though the property market remained broadly subdued with values still down on a year earlier and more than 17% below their 2022 peak.】

item.title: 马什称美国油轮保险计划可能需要数周时间
item.description: 全球最大保险经纪公司马什表示，美国为穿越霍尔木兹海峡这一能源咽喉要道的油轮提供保险的计划，可能需要数周时间才能落实。【原文：Marsh, the world’s largest insurance broker, said a US plan to insure tankers navigating the Strait of Hormuz energy chokepoint could take a few weeks to arrange.】

item.title: 黑石集团借助私募信贷为收购Champions Group提供资金
item.description: 黑石集团以超过10亿美元的私募信贷贷款为收购住宅服务提供商冠军集团提供资金支持。当前，私募股权公司和贷款机构正纷纷撤离易受人工智能颠覆影响的行业领域。【原文：Blackstone Inc. financed its acquisition of residential services provider Champions Group with a more than $1 billion private credit loan as buyout firms and lenders seek refuge from sectors prone to artificial intelligence disruption.】

item.title: Supercell配合美国对母公司腾讯的安全调查
item.description: 腾讯控股旗下的芬兰游戏公司Supercell Oy表示，正配合美国政府对其中国母公司数据处理实践的安保调查。【原文：Supercell Oy, the Finnish game company owned by Tencent Holdings Ltd., said it’s cooperating with a US government security probe of its Chinese parent’s data practices.】

item.title: 普京称俄罗斯将考虑将天然气供应转向欧盟以外地区
item.description: 俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京表示，该国将考虑停止向欧洲出口大部分天然气，转而开拓更有前景的替代市场。【原文：Russian President Vladimir Putin said his country will consider ending most sales of natural gas to Europe in favor of more promising alternative markets.】

item.title: 超级油轮开始撤离海湾，霍尔木兹海峡危机加剧
item.description: 在霍尔木兹海峡这一战略要冲动荡之际，超级油轮已开始放弃原定驶入波斯湾的航程，转而寻求更安全的航行目的地。【原文：Supertankers have begun to abandon planned voyages into the Persian Gulf and seek safer destinations amid the turmoil at the strategic Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 美国司法部调查美国化肥市场是否存在价格垄断行为
item.description: 据知情人士透露，美国司法部正在调查多家商业化肥主要生产商是否存在合谋抬高价格的行为。【原文：The Justice Department has been investigating whether several leading producers of commercial fertilizers colluded to raise prices, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 阿波罗资本的齐托预计私募信贷困境将持续长达18个月
item.description: 阿波罗全球管理公司的约翰·齐托表示，私募信贷面临的动荡可能持续到明年，但他淡化了某些基金出现大规模赎回潮的问题。【原文：Apollo Global Management Inc.’s John Zito said the turmoil facing private credit could endure well into next year, but downplayed the idea that the wave of withdrawals in some funds are a problem.】

item.title: 厄尔尼诺引发的恶劣天气恐将削弱秘鲁农产品出口热潮
item.description: 秘鲁农产品出口商正紧急应对突如其来的恶劣天气，这可能阻碍该国持续多年的增长势头——正是这股势头使这个南美国家成为水果蔬菜生产大国。【原文：Peru’s agricultural exporters are rushing to prepare for an unexpected year of bad weather that could slow a long growth streak that turned the South American nation into a fruit and vegetable powerhouse.】

item.title: 美敦力糖尿病业务部门MiniMed的首次公开募股引发分析师争论
item.description: 糖尿病管理设备制造商MiniMed集团公司即将从医疗巨头美敦力公司剥离，其首次公开募股（IPO）所寻求的估值是否与其增长前景相符，正引发分析师们的激烈争论。【原文：MiniMed Group Inc., a maker of diabetes management devices that will be separated from health giant Medtronic Plc, is spurring debate among analysts over whether its growth prospects justify the valuation it’s seeking in an IPO.】

item.title: 沃什获提名担任美联储主席，确认之路前景不明
item.description: 白宫周三在一份声明中表示，唐纳德·特朗普总统已正式提名凯文·沃什担任美联储理事会主席。【原文：President Donald Trump has formally nominated Kevin Warsh to serve as chair of the Federal Reserve’s Board of Governors, the White House said Wednesday in a statement.】

item.title: 尽管伊朗战争爆发，DoubleLine仍看好新兴市场的"良性循环"
item.description: DoubleLine的比尔·坎贝尔指出，尽管中东局势紧张加剧令全球投资者感到不安，但发达经济体与发展中经济体之间的结构性趋同正在为新兴市场创造"重大"机遇。【原文：A structural convergence between advanced and developing economies is creating “significant” opportunities in emerging markets even as escalating tensions in the Middle East unsettle global investors, according to DoubleLine’s Bill Campbell.】

item.title: 西部数据首席执行官专注于制造更大容量的硬盘，而非增加产量
item.description: 面对数据存储需求在整个行业的激增，西部数据公司正致力于生产更高容量的硬盘，而非简单地增加产量。【原文：WD Corp., facing an industrywide surge in demand for data storage, is focused on producing higher-capacity hard drives, rather than simply building more units.】

item.title: 威兹航空下调业绩预期，伊朗冲突影响航班及航空燃油供应
item.description: 维兹航空控股公司下调年度盈利预期，因中东持续冲突迫使这家廉价航空公司暂停航班并承担燃油价格上涨的成本。【原文：Wizz Air Holdings Plc cut its annual profit guidance as the ongoing conflict in the Middle East forces the budget carrier to suspend flights and absorb the cost of higher fuel prices.】

item.title: 波兰总统将央行卷入欧盟防务贷款争端
item.description: 波兰总统卡罗尔·纳沃罗茨基表示，该国央行可提供低成本国防融资，作为替代欧盟武器贷款计划中440亿欧元（约合512亿美元）资金的方案。【原文：Polish President Karol Nawrocki said the central bank can provide cheap defense financing as an alternative to €44 billion ($51.2 billion) from the European Union’s loans-for-weapons program.】

item.title: 谷歌提议共享应用商店目录以解决案件
item.description: 字母表公司旗下的谷歌与Epic Games公司周三提出一项新和解方案，旨在解决两家公司之间旷日持久的反垄断诉讼案。【原文：Alphabet Inc.’s Google and Epic Games Inc. proposed a new settlement Wednesday to resolve a long-running antitrust case between the two companies.】

item.title: 网络极端主义斗士试图通过协助地方官员来遏制暴力行为
item.description: 学者们正与美国国土安全部前官员携手开展一项新计划。【原文：Academics are teaming up with former Department of Homeland Security staffers on a new initiative.】

item.title: BTIG加入高盛、Citadel证券行列，看涨股票
item.description: BTIG已成为最新一家为美国股市投资者看到隧道尽头曙光的机构，加入高盛集团和Citadel证券的看涨行列。【原文：BTIG has become the latest to see a light at the end of the tunnel for US stock investors, joining Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and Citadel Securities in their bullish calls.】

item.title: 英特尔首席财务官称服务器需求在供应短缺中依然强劲
item.description: 英特尔公司首席财务官戴夫·津斯纳在一次会议上表示，该公司利润丰厚的服务器处理器需求强劲，预计这种情况将持续到明年。【原文：Intel Corp. is experiencing strong demand for lucrative server processors and expects that situation to continue into next year, Chief Financial Officer Dave Zinsner said at a conference.】

item.title: PagerDuty首席执行官特哈达称软件担忧被“过度渲染”
item.description: 珍妮弗·特哈达表示，市场对人工智能颠覆的担忧导致其软件公司PagerDuty Inc.股价今年暴跌近42%，但她认为这些担忧是"过度反应"。【原文：Jennifer Tejada, whose software company PagerDuty Inc. has plummeted almost 42% this year over concerns about AI disruption, said the worries are “overbaked.”】

item.title: 资金涌入新兴市场ETF，股市遭遇崩盘冲击
item.description: 本周，尽管市场剧烈震荡，投资者仍持续向投资新兴市场的交易所交易基金注资，这表明他们相信中东战争不会长期动摇风险资产。【原文：Investors kept putting money into exchange-traded funds that invest in emerging-markets this week even as markets convulsed, indicating confidence that the war in the Middle East won’t roil risk assets for long.】

item.title: 美国化工股有望因战争引发的价格上涨而受益
item.description: 分析师指出，美国上市化工股有望受益于伊朗战争引发的供应紧缩和价格上涨。【原文：US-listed chemicals stocks are likely to benefit from tighter supply and higher prices fueled by the war with Iran, according to analysts.】

item.title: 谷歌Pixel 10a迭代幅度过小，即便售价499美元也不值得推荐
item.description: 谷歌售价499美元的Pixel 10a智能手机未能在聚光灯下停留太久。就在该设备3月5日发售日前夕，苹果公司本周宣布推出售价599美元的iPhone 17e，该机型将于3月11日正式上市。【原文：Google’s $499 Pixel 10a smartphone didn’t get to enjoy the spotlight for long. This week, just days before the device’s March 5 release date, Apple Inc. announced the $599 iPhone 17e, which goes on sale March 11.】

item.title: 欧盟遴选瑞典、英国企业管理50亿欧元科技基金
item.description: 欧盟计划设立一项基金，用于资助从事量子计算、人工智能及其他尖端技术领域的公司，目前已从法国、瑞典和英国遴选出多家管理公司进入候选名单。【原文：A planned European Union fund to finance companies working on quantum computing, artificial intelligence and other deep tech fields has shortlisted management firms from France, Sweden and the UK.】

item.title: 贝克休斯寻求发行100亿美元跨境债券
item.description: 知情人士透露，贝克休斯公司计划通过跨境债券发行筹集约100亿美元资金，用于收购Chart Industries公司。【原文：Baker Hughes Co. is planning to raise about $10 billion from a cross-border bond sale to help fund its acquisition of Chart Industries Inc., according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 银湖资本支持的UFC、WWE所有者获得近10亿美元贷款
item.description: 据知情人士透露，在周三宣布向股权持有者派发股息后，运营UFC和WWE的TKO集团控股公司已在杠杆贷款市场发起近10亿美元的融资。【原文：UFC and WWE operator TKO Group Holdings, Inc. launched a nearly $1 billion offering in the leveraged loan market, according to a person familiar with the transaction, after the company announced a dividend to equity holders on Wednesday.】

item.title: 伊朗在美军空袭两天后仍继续在哈尔格岛装运原油
item.description: 伊朗周一继续在其哈尔格岛石油终端向油轮装载原油，此前两天美国和以色列对这个波斯湾国家发动了空袭。随着冲突升级，目前尚不清楚这种装载能否持续。【原文：Iran continued loading crude onto tankers at its Kharg Island oil terminal on Monday, two days after the US and Israel launched air attacks against the Persian Gulf country. It’s unclear whether that can continue as the conflict has intensified.】

item.title: 俄亥俄天主教学院因面临赤字未能支付三月债券款项
item.description: 俄亥俄多米尼加大学未能支付3月1日到期的债券款项——这是该校财务困境的最新迹象。【原文：Ohio Dominican University didn’t make a bond payment due on March 1 — the latest sign of the school’s financial woes.】

item.title: Neura Robotics在Tether支持的融资轮中筹集10亿欧元
item.description: 德国初创企业Neura Robotics正筹集约10亿欧元（12亿美元）资金，本轮融资由稳定币发行商Tether Holdings SA支持，旨在开发人工智能驱动的人形机器人。【原文：German startup Neura Robotics is raising about €1 billion ($1.2 billion) in a funding round backed by stablecoin issuer Tether Holdings SA to develop an artificial-intelligence-powered humanoid robot.】
